mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.document_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.username, u.nickname, d.title AS document_title, pu.id AS replied_user_id, pu.username AS replied_username, pu.nickname AS replied_nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN document d ON c.document_id = d.id LEFT JOIN comment pc ON c.parent_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON pc.user_id = pu.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT c.id, c.document_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.username, u.nickname, d.title AS document_title, pu.id AS replied_user_id, pu.username AS replied_username, pu.nickname AS replied_nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN document d ON c.document_id = d.id LEFT JOIN comment pc ON c.parent_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON pc.user_id = pu.id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND c.user_id != #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c JOIN document d ON c.document_id = d.id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND c.user_id != #{userId}
